Chapter 1  Setting Up Microsoft QuickBASIC

Source: https://www.pcjs.org/documents/books/mspl13/basic/qblearn/

## Overview

This chapter covers installation of QuickBASIC 4.5 using the SETUP program
and introduces the different paths for novice and experienced programmers.

## The Setup Program

QuickBASIC includes SETUP.EXE on the Setup/Microsoft QB Express disk. To start:

    Place the Setup/Microsoft QB Express disk in your disk drive, and type
    setup at the DOS prompt.

### Hardware Requirements

- IBM Personal Computer or compatible
- At least 384K of available memory (640K recommended)
- Minimum 720K disk-drive capacity
- Hard disk recommended (1.8 MB for full installation)
- Microsoft Mouse compatible pointing device (optional)

### The Setup Main Menu

- **Easy Setup** — Choose defaults for all options (recommended for novices)
- **Full Setup** — Customize all options during setup

### Installation

Without a hard disk: need five formatted 360K removable disks (or equivalent).
With a hard disk: need 1.8 megabytes of space.

## QB Express

After installation, choose "Exit and Run QB Express" from the main menu.
QB Express is a brief computer-based training program introducing the
QuickBASIC environment. Alerts returning users to Version 4.5 enhancements.

## Getting Into QuickBASIC

### If You Are a Novice Programmer

1. Read Chapter 2 "Using Menus and Commands" and Chapter 3 "QuickBASIC's Windows"
2. Read Chapter 4 "Interlude: BASIC for Beginners"
3. Work through Part 2 "Hands On with QuickBASIC" (Chapters 5-9)

### If You Already Know BASIC

1. Skim Chapters 2 and 3 for environment basics
2. Skip Chapter 4
3. Move to Part 2 "Hands On with QuickBASIC"

### If You Use a Mouse

QuickBASIC fully supports pointing devices compatible with the Microsoft Mouse.
See Section 10.7 for complete information.

## Files Included

| File/Component    | Purpose                                              |
|-------------------|------------------------------------------------------|
| QB45QCK.HLP       | QuickSCREEN summaries and syntax for statements      |
| QB45ADVR.HLP      | Comprehensive QB Advisor help with examples           |
| QB45ENER.HLP      | Environment menus, commands, dialog boxes, errors     |
| README.DOC        | Post-printing changes to QuickBASIC                   |
| PACKING.LST       | Description of each file on distribution disks        |
| LEARN.COM         | QB Express computer-based training                    |
| Sample programs    | All programs from "Programming in BASIC"              |
